zh.lifeSummary: 當Avice Marmion於1309年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham17歲，母親Maud Furnival30歲。她於大約1329年與John Grey結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1378年3月20日之後在英國奧可福爾，埋葬在英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avice Marmion于1309年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham17岁，母亲Maud Furnival30岁。她于大约1329年与John Grey结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1378年3月20日之后在英国奧可福爾，埋葬在英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯。

nameMeanings.name: Marmion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: perhaps an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name. Compare   Merriman  .
English (Lancashire; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French marmion ‘monkey, brat’.

variants.name: Merriman
meanings: nickname from Middle English mirie, merie, murie ‘merry, pleasant’ + man ‘man’. Compare Merry 1. This surname is established in Ireland (perhaps as an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name; compare Marmion ) as well as England.

there has probably been some confusion with Marriman, probably an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’, or perhaps a pet form of Mary using the hypocoristic suffix -man. The surname Marriman is now vanishingly rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marmon
meanings: variant of Marriman, an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’.

nameMeanings.name: Avice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Avice Marmion was born in 1309, in Yorkshire, England, her father, John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham, was 17 and her mother, Maud Furnival, was 30. She married John Grey about 1329. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 20 March 1378, in Oxfordshire, England, and was buried in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avice Marmion est née en 1309, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Maud Furnival, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John Grey environ 1329. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 20 mars 1378, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avice Marmion 1309 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham 17 und ihre Mutter Maud Furnival 30. Sie hat um 1329 John Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 20. März 1378 in Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avice Marmion è nata il nel 1309 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Maud Furnival, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John Grey circa 1329. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 20 marzo 1378, nel Oxfordshire, England, e fu sepolta a Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Avice Marmionが1309年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringhamは17歳，母Maud Furnivalは30歳であった。約1329年にJohn Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1378年3月20日以後にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド グレイズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Avice Marmion(이)가 1309년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Furnival(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1329년 John Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1378년 3월 20일 이후 영국 스퍼드실르에서 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avice Marmion nasceu em 1309, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Maud Furnival, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com John Grey aproximadamente 1329. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 20 de março de 1378, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avice Marmion родилась в 1309 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Furnival, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Grey около 1329 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 20 марта 1378 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Avice Marmion nació en 1309, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Maud Furnival, tenía 30 años. Se casó con John Grey aproximadamente 1329. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 20 de marzo de 1378, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
